effect.name: GLAME Bandpass
effect.description:
GLAME Bandpass Filter (LADSPA 1892)
IIR bandpass filter based using Chebishev coefficients. The filter allows you to tweak the number of stages used for filtering. Every stage adds two more poles, which leads to a steeper dropoff.
effect.author: Steve Harris (http://www.ladspa.org)

parameter.name: Stages
parameter.comment:
Every stage adds two more
poles, which leads to a steeper dropoff.
